subject: [For Shuning's Approval - Nov 2025] Reg CB - Off In Lieu

content.answer:
Hi Shuning,

Seeking your final approval now that Jiahui has confirmed both BPMs were
activated for the 11.11 campaign. I understand you had provided
pre-approval earlier, but I’m consolidating and submitting this formally
for your confirmation before seeking Ian's approval.

*BPM Team:*

   - Submission for 11.11 campaign, pre-approved by Shuning for BPM to
   standby in case of any emergency. Email attached for reference.

Credit Month Department Subteam Team Lead Name Email Reason OIL Date
(DD/MM/YYYY) No. of Hours Total OIL
Days Credit
Nov-2025 Regional Cross Border BPM Ren Jiahui Yu Qing qing.yu@shopee.com
<ran.xie@shopee.com> 11.11 Campaign Standby
(19:00-02:00) 11/11/2025 6 0.5
Nov-2025 Regional Cross Border BPM Ren Jiahui Liu Jiacheng
jiacheng.liu@shopee.com 11.11 Campaign Standby
(19:00-02:00) 10/11/2025 6 0.5

*SIP Markets Team:*
The livestream standby was a new initiative. We have tried to find system
solutions to avoid standby but finally didn’t manage to fix the system in
time. So the human standby was a last minute alternative way to ensure the
business outcome, with the following scope of support. Email attached for
reference.

   - Real time price and promotion validation and re-adjust based on P
   seller price changes
   - Monitor featured SKUs status and stock, matching between P & A sites
   - Configure and adjust shop AMS
   - Coordination between KOLs/Sellers to ensure smooth session
   - Resolve adhoc shop operational issues
   - Limited time promotional initiatives to boost sales

Credit Month Department Subteam Team Lead Name Email Reason OIL Date
(DD/MM/YYYY) No. of Hours Total OIL
Days Credit
